revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初六]][[zh:七月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初六]][[zh:七月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初六]][[zh:七月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初六]][[zh:七月初六]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 6|qq=July 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenchō|en|Tenchō|qid=Q1373138|lt=Tenchō|1=Tenchō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|825|en|825|qid=Q24624|lt=825|1=825}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|en|Emperor Kanmu|qid=Q314846|lt=Kanmu|1=Emperor Kanmu}} 's grandson, {{ill|Prince Takatsune|ja|高棟王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Takatsune|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 平高棟|1=Taira no Takamune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483792}} , was demoted to commoner status and granted the surname {{ill|Taira clan|ja|Taira Clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * Year 6 of {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} , {{ill|1563|en|1563|qid=Q6629|lt=1563|1=1563}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} , then known as {{ill|Matsudaira Motoyasu|ja|松平元康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Motoyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q171977}} , severed ties with the {{ill|Imagawa clan|en|Imagawa clan|qid=Q1764434|lt=Imagawa clan|1=Imagawa clan}} and officially changed his name to Ieyasu.
== Births == * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tempō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}} , {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} ) – {{ill|Tsuda Sen|en|Tsuda Sen|qid=Q2600702|lt=Tsuda Sen|1=Tsuda Sen}} , agronomist and father of {{ill|Tsuda Umeko|en|Tsuda Umeko|qid=Q514524|lt=Tsuda Umeko|1=Tsuda Umeko}} (d. {{ill|1908|en|1908|qid=Q2056|lt=1908|1=1908}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 18|en|August 18|qid=Q2826|lt=August 18|1=August 18}} , {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} ) – {{ill|Tahara Yoshizumi|ja|田原良純|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tahara Yoshizumi|1=Tawara Yoshizumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11576287}} , Japan’s first {{ill|Doctor of Pharmacy|ja|薬学博士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doctor of Pharmacy|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 博士（薬学）|1=Doctor of Pharmacy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q85866748}} (d. {{ill|1935|en|1935|qid=Q18658|lt=1935|1=1935}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 7 of {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|qid=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 11|en|August 11|qid=Q2778|lt=August 11|1=August 11}} , {{ill|723|en|723|qid=Q23545|lt=723|1=723}} ) – {{ill|Ō no Yasumaro|en|Ō no Yasumaro|qid=Q384705|lt=Ō no Yasumaro|1=Ō no Yasumaro}} , compiler of the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} (birth year unknown). * Year 5 of {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 21|en|August 21|qid=Q2823|lt=August 21|1=August 21}} , {{ill|1708|en|1708|qid=Q6846|lt=1708|1=1708}} ) – {{ill|Kuroda Tsuneyuki|ja|黒田綱之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Tsuneyuki|1=Kuroda Tsunayuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11678675}} , 3rd {{ill|daimyō|ja|藩主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藩|1=Han system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q841985}} of {{ill|Fukuoka Domain|en|Fukuoka Domain|qid=Q208766|lt=Fukuoka Domain|1=Fukuoka Domain}} , son of {{ill|Kuroda Mitsuyuki|ja|黒田光之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroda Mitsuyuki|1=Kuroda Mitsuyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11678571}} (b. {{ill|1655|en|1655|qid=Q6975|lt=1655|1=1655}} ). * Year 5 of {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|en|Shōtoku (era)|qid=Q1193848|lt=Shōtoku|1=Shōtoku (era)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|qid=Q2784|lt=August 4|1=August 4}} , {{ill|1715|en|1715|qid=Q6884|lt=1715|1=1715}} ) – {{ill|Inō Jakusui|ja|稲生若水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Jakusui|1=Inō Jakusui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6561157}} , physician and scholar of {{ill|Herbal medicine|en|Herbal medicine|qid=Q861699|lt=honzōgaku|1=Herbal medicine}} (b. {{ill|1655|en|1655|qid=Q6975|lt=1655|1=1655}} ). * Year 11 of {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}} , {{ill|1761|en|1761|qid=Q7649|lt=1761|1=1761}} ) – {{ill|Noro Mototake|ja|野呂元丈|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Noro Mototake|1=Noro Genjō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6531817}} , honzōgaku scholar (b. {{ill|1694|en|1694|qid=Q7694|lt=1694|1=1694}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 8|en|August 8|qid=Q2780|lt=August 8|1=August 8}} , {{ill|1845|en|1845|qid=Q7636|lt=1845|1=1845}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Naritaka|en|Tokugawa Naritaka|qid=Q3530492|lt=Tokugawa Naritomo|1=Tokugawa Naritaka}} , 12th head of the {{ill|Owari Tokugawa family|en|Owari Tokugawa family|qid=Q841740|lt=Owari Tokugawa family|1=Owari Tokugawa family}} (b. {{ill|1810|en|1810|qid=Q6922|lt=1810|1=1810}} ). * Year 5 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}} , {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iesada|en|Tokugawa Iesada|qid=Q336383|lt=Tokugawa Iesada|1=Tokugawa Iesada}} , 13th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1824|en|1824|qid=Q6994|lt=1824|1=1824}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|5|7|7|6|6|8|7|0706|qq=}}
